summary: A trauma-informed mental health awareness app featuring AI therapist 'Serenity' who conducts onboarding intake sessions, builds personalized therapy plans using CBT/DBT, hosts real-time group sessions with avatar privacy, and manages a purchasable session calendar. Users track therapy milestones and wellness streaks, earning visual trophy badges that unlock session discounts.
architectural_notes: Real-time group session presence is polling-based (no WebSocket support); users appear as avatars with pseudonyms
AI therapist 'Serenity' uses built-in LLM integration applying CBT, DBT, and other evidence-based therapy frameworks
Monetization: therapy plans, one-on-one sessions, and group classes are purchasable; trophies unlock session discounts
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Glowing gold trophy cup badge illustration for 'First Session' milestone award (trophy-badge-first-session.dim_256x256.png)
- Teal flame streak badge illustration for 'Mood Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-mood-streak.dim_256x256.png)
- Purple star badge illustration for 'Journaling Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-journal-streak.dim_256x256.png)
- Green lotus flower badge illustration for 'Wellness Tools' milestone achievement (trophy-badge-wellness-tools.dim_256x256.png)
- Rose gold ribbon badge illustration for 'Group Session Attendee' milestone achievement (trophy-badge-group-session.dim_256x256.png)
- Silver crescent moon badge illustration for 'Breathing Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-breathing-streak.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a Goals & Progress page accessible from the main app navigation. Display two sections: 'Therapy Milestones' and 'Wellness Streaks'. Each goal card should show the goal title, description, a progress bar (current vs. target), and a locked/unlocked state. Completed goals should display a 'Completed' badge and the date achieved.

Create a Trophies page (or tab within the Goals & Progress page) that displays all earned and locked trophy badges. Each earned trophy should render as a full-color visual badge image with its title and earn date. Locked trophies should be displayed as greyed-out/silhouette badges with a hint of the goal needed to unlock them. For trophies that unlock a session discount, display the discount amount and a copyable discount code prominently on the earned badge card.

Integrate goal progress tracking with existing user actions in the app: mood log submissions should increment streak-based wellness goals; journal entry submissions should increment journaling streak goals; session completions with Serenity should advance therapy milestone goals; group class attendance should advance group session milestone goals; and breathing/grounding/reframing tool usage should increment corresponding wellness tool goals.

Add a trophy badge notification or toast that appears when a user earns a new trophy. The notification should show the badge image, trophy name, and a congratulatory message. If the trophy includes a session discount, also display the discount amount in the notification.

new_feature_requests.summary: Serenity AI onboarding intake session on signup using CBT/DBT to generate personalized therapy plan
Customized therapy plans with paid one-on-one talk sessions with Serenity
Group sessions calendar where Serenity posts purchasable group classes
Real-time group sessions with user avatars and privacy-preserving pseudonyms (polling-based)
User authentication, login, and session history tracking
Goal-oriented progress system with therapy milestones and personal wellness streak targets
Trophy/badge system: visual badges awarded for milestone/streak goals that also unlock session discounts

Extend the backend to store and manage user goals, including therapy milestone goals (e.g., 'Complete 1st session with Serenity', 'Finish 3 CBT exercises', 'Attend a group class') and personal wellness streak targets (e.g., 'Log mood 7 days in a row', 'Use breathing tool 5 times', 'Journal for 3 consecutive days'). Each goal should track: id, title, description, goal type (milestone or streak), target value, current progress, completion status, and completion timestamp.

Extend the backend to store and manage trophies/badges. Each trophy should be associated with a specific goal (awarded upon goal completion) and include: id, title, description, badge image identifier, date earned, and an optional session discount code or discount percentage it unlocks. When a goal is completed, automatically award the corresponding trophy to the user and generate a discount code if applicable.
